# Edu-Hawk Worldwide

## Overview
Edu-Hawk Worldwide is a trusted MBBS abroad consultancy for Indian students who want to study medicine in NMC-approved universities abroad. The company provides expert guidance for MBBS admission abroad, university selection, document support, visa assistance, and end-to-end counselling.

## Services
- MBBS admission abroad counselling
- University selection and application support
- Visa guidance and pre-departure assistance
- Affordable MBBS options in countries like Russia, Georgia, Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Nepal, Bangladesh, Egypt, and more
- Overseas education guidance for Indian students
- Support for medical education abroad and FMGE preparation

## Keywords
MBBS abroad, study MBBS abroad, MBBS admission abroad, MBBS counselling, medical education abroad, overseas education, foreign medical universities, MBBS consultancy, guidance, study MBBS in lakhs

## Brand Summary
Edu-Hawk Worldwide helps Indian students plan safe, transparent, and affordable MBBS journeys abroad with trusted counselling and complete support from application to arrival.

## Compromised Sites Policy Summary
A compromised site is a destination whose code has been manipulated to act in ways that benefit a third party without the site owner’s knowledge, often harming users.

### Common violations
- Hijacked or hacked destinations
- Scripts or code that transmit user data without consent
- Malware installation on end-user devices
- Pop-up ad injection or unauthorised redirects
- Use of content management systems with known security vulnerabilities that have been exploited

### Recommended fixes
- Review the disapproval reason in Google Ads and identify the affected domain
- Remove any malicious or unauthorised code from the site
- Check the site using Google Safe Browsing and Search Console security reports
- Update CMS, themes, and plugins to the latest secure versions
- If the site cannot be fixed, update the ad to a compliant destination
- Appeal the decision after the issue has been resolved
